summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MCP Hub Tool Customization System. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend flows working correctly - Create Tool modal, Param Edit modal, tool toggles, Test Terminal with param editing.

minor.issue: Was returning 500 due to missing await on async _get_tool_definitions() - FIXED

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - successful login returns JWT token
GET /api/chatwoot/tools - requires auth, returns 55 tools with overrides merged
POST /api/chatwoot/tools/parse-schema - parses cURL PUT request with path params and JSON body
POST /api/chatwoot/tools/parse-schema - parses cURL POST request
POST /api/chatwoot/tools/parse-schema - parses raw JSON body
POST /api/chatwoot/tools/parse-schema - rejects empty schema (400)
POST /api/chatwoot/tools/parse-schema - rejects invalid schema (400)
POST /api/chatwoot/tools/create - creates custom tool with parameters
POST /api/chatwoot/tools/create - rejects duplicate tool name (409)
PUT /api/chatwoot/tools/{tool_name} - toggles tool enabled state off
PUT /api/chatwoot/tools/{tool_name} - toggles tool enabled state on
PUT /api/chatwoot/tools/{tool_name} - updates tool description
PUT /api/chatwoot/tools/{tool_name} - rejects empty payload (400)
PUT /api/chatwoot/tools/{tool_name}/params/{param_name} - adds new parameter
PUT /api/chatwoot/tools/{tool_name}/params/{param_name} - updates existing parameter
PUT /api/chatwoot/tools/{tool_name}/params/{param_name} - adds enum parameter with options
DELETE /api/chatwoot/tools/{tool_name}/params/{param_name} - removes parameter override
GET /api/chatwoot/mcp/info - returns server info with tools_count
PUT /api/chatwoot/tools/custom/{tool_name} - updates custom tool
DELETE /api/chatwoot/tools/custom/{tool_name} - deletes custom tool
DELETE /api/chatwoot/tools/custom/nonexistent - returns 404
Frontend: Login page loads and authenticates correctly
Frontend: Dashboard hub shows Chatwoot app with 55 tools and CONNECTED status
Frontend: Tool Explorer shows all tools with toggle switches
Frontend: + NEW TOOL button opens Create Tool modal
Frontend: Create Tool modal parses cURL and shows preview with parameters
Frontend: Pencil icons appear on param tags on hover in Tool Explorer
Frontend: Clicking pencil icon opens Param Edit modal
Frontend: Param Edit modal shows name, type, required toggle, description, default value
Frontend: Tool toggle switches enable/disable tools
Frontend: Test Terminal shows selected tool with parameter inputs
Frontend: Pencil icons appear on param labels in Test Terminal on hover
Frontend: Test Terminal param edit opens Param Edit modal
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /api/chatwoot/mcp/info endpoint was calling async _get_tool_definitions() without await, causing TypeError
seed_data_creation: Test custom tools and param overrides created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tool customization system fully implemented and tested. New endpoints: POST /api/chatwoot/tools/parse-schema (parses cURL/JSON), POST /api/chatwoot/tools/create (custom tools), PUT /api/chatwoot/tools/{name} (toggle/update), PUT/DELETE /api/chatwoot/tools/{name}/params/{param} (param CRUD). Custom tools stored in db.custom_tools, param overrides in db.tool_overrides. Frontend modals: CreateToolModal.js, ParamEditModal.js. Pencil icons appear on hover for param tags in ToolExplorer and TestTerminal.
